name: SEO GSC Monitor — Daily Pull + Slack Digest

notes:
SEO GSC Monitor — daily Google Search Console metrics pull.

Required n8n env vars:
  GSC_CLIENT_ID         — Google OAuth2 Client ID
  GSC_CLIENT_SECRET     — Google OAuth2 Client Secret
  GSC_REFRESH_TOKEN     — OAuth2 refresh token (obtained via one-time auth flow)
  GSC_SITE_URL          — Site property URL (default: https://docs.gostoa.dev)
  SLACK_CONTENT_WEBHOOK — Slack webhook for SEO notifications (or SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL)
  PUSHGATEWAY_URL       — Prometheus Pushgateway URL
  PUSHGATEWAY_AUTH      — Pushgateway basic auth (user:pass)

Setup:
  1. Store GSC_CLIENT_ID + GSC_CLIENT_SECRET in Infisical /n8n/
  2. Run the one-time OAuth2 consent flow (see scripts/ai-ops/gsc-get-refresh-token.sh)
  3. Store the refresh token in Infisical /n8n/GSC_REFRESH_TOKEN
  4. Import this workflow in n8n, activate it
  5. Verify: trigger manually, check Slack + Pushgateway

Node settings required:
  NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto,https,url,buffer,fs
  N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false

OpenSearch env vars:
  OPENSEARCH_URL  — OpenSearch endpoint (default: https://opensearch.gostoa.dev)
  OPENSEARCH_AUTH — Basic auth user:pass (default: admin:admin)

Index pattern: seo-metrics-YYYY-MM (monthly rollover)
ILM: configure 365-day retention on seo-metrics-* indices
